Imperial Limousine NY

Privacy Policy

Effective Date: April 29, 2026

Who we are: Imperial Limousine NY provides luxury transportation services in New York and surrounding areas.

Information we collect: We collect only the information needed to manage reservations and inquiries, including name, email address, phone number, pickup address, and dropoff address.

How we use your data: We use this information only to process reservation requests, provide customer support, and respond to contact form submissions.

Data sharing: We do not sell your personal information. We only share data with service providers required to operate bookings and communications (for example, payment and email services).

Cookie policy: This website may use essential cookies or similar technologies to support site functionality and improve user experience. These are not used to sell or broker personal data.

Contact: For privacy questions or requests, contact imperiallimony@gmail.com.
